title: From TCP to HTTP | Full Course by @ThePrimeagen
description:
The web is built on HTTP, and there's no better way to understand how something works than to implement it yourself. In this course, we'll learn the nitty-gritty details of the HTTP/1.1 protocol, and as we do so we'll actually build our own HTTP server from scratch in Golang. By the end, you'll have a deep understanding of how web transport works.

This walkthrough was created and recorded by @ThePrimeagen !

Use code "PRIME" for 25% off your first payment.

Learn HTTP Protocol- https://www.boot.dev/courses/learn-http-protocol-golang
Learn back-end development - https://www.boot.dev

04:00:46 - Chapter 8 - Chunked Encoding
04:32:24 - Chapter 9 - Binary Data
04:38:01 - Outro
